entries.title: Film 1 - Shaw Integration
entries.excerpt: The official first Shaw film, completed as fixed-bid pre-contract conference work.

entries.title: Film 2 - Amplify
entries.excerpt: Completed Amplify V1 and V2 establish the first part of the aligned Summit campaign loop.

entries.title: Film 3 - AI Advisor
entries.excerpt: Creative brainstorming is complete; the selected story will align AI Advisor with Amplify, Insight, and the central Spectrum narrative.

entries.title: Film 4 - Insight
entries.excerpt: Planned film for Insight, a Spectrum feature and capability, completing the coordinated three-film Summit loop.

entries.title: Spectrum
entries.excerpt: Spectrum is the central lending platform story connecting Shaw's current film campaign.

entries.title: Amplify
entries.excerpt: Amplify is Shaw's AI-powered intelligence layer and decisioning engine.

entries.title: AI Advisor
entries.excerpt: AI Advisor is the subject of Film 3; Next Best Action is a core confirmed story element.

entries.title: Insight
entries.excerpt: Insight is a Spectrum feature and capability and the planned subject of Film 4.

entries.title: Films 2–4 form one Summit campaign loop
entries.excerpt: Amplify, AI Advisor, and Insight must be planned and reviewed as one coordinated three-film loop.

entries.title: Conference AV and live production
entries.excerpt: Completed live conference support is retained as a Value and Library record rather than a film project.

entries.title: Team training
entries.excerpt: Completed hands-on AI workflow training for Shaw's marketing team.

entries.title: Agent architecture
entries.excerpt: Completed workflow and agent architecture work is retained as relationship value, not a film project.

entries.title: Loop video assets
entries.excerpt: Completed reusable logo sequence assets for conferences and digital displays.

entries.title: Three-film Summit campaign system
entries.excerpt: Amplify, AI Advisor, and Insight build one cumulative Spectrum story.

entries.title: Product accuracy gate
entries.excerpt: Every film distinguishes confirmed behavior from planned or unverified behavior.
